qbo.description: Import tax amounts from a QuickBooks tax report CSV file.

help.csvRequirement: The CSV must include Invoice Number, Invoice Date, and Tax Amount columns.

steps.s1: In QuickBooks, go to Reports > All Reports
steps.s2: Select Sales Tax Liability or Transaction Detail by Account
steps.s3: Set the date range to match your exported invoices
steps.s4: Click Export and choose Export to Excel or Export to CSV
steps.s5: Save the file and upload it here

help.title: How to export tax data from QuickBooks

unified.title: Import Tax from CSV
unified.xeroCsvDescription: The exported CSV includes Invoice Number, Contact Name, Line Amount, Tax Amount, and tracking categories.

xeroHelp.note: Note: Only invoices originally exported from Alga PSA (with Source System = AlgaPSA tracking) will be matched.
xeroHelp.s1: In Xero, go to Sales > Invoices
xeroHelp.s2: Select the invoice tab you want to export from (e.g., Paid, Awaiting Payment)
xeroHelp.s3: (Optional) Click Search to filter by Start date, End date, or Date type
xeroHelp.s5: Xero downloads a CSV file to your computer

xero.description: Import tax amounts from a Xero Invoice Details Report CSV file.

help.csvRequirement: The report should include columns for Invoice Number, Contact Name, Line Amount, and Tax Amount. Invoices are matched using the Reference field or tracking categories set during export.

steps.s1: In Xero, go to Reports > All Reports
steps.s4: Set the date range to match your exported invoices

troubleshooting.title: Delivery error reference
troubleshooting.description: What each Teams delivery error code means and how to resolve it.

graph_unauthorized.cause: Microsoft Graph rejected the application token (401/403); a required Graph application permission is not consented.
graph_unauthorized.remedy: Grant admin consent for the required Graph permissions (for example TeamsActivity.Send) in the Azure app registration.

user_not_mapped.cause: The recipient has not signed in to Alga PSA with Microsoft, so no account mapping exists.
user_not_mapped.remedy: Have the user sign in with Microsoft (MSP portal SSO or the Teams tab) so their account is mapped.

addon_inactive.cause: The Teams add-on is expired or absent, so sends are skipped while configuration is preserved.
addon_inactive.remedy: Renew the Teams add-on for this tenant.

integration_inactive.cause: The Teams integration is not active for this tenant.
integration_inactive.remedy: Activate the Teams integration in settings.

package_misconfigured.cause: The app package was never generated, or delivery prerequisites (app ID, base URL) are missing.
package_misconfigured.remedy: Generate the Teams app package in settings, then retry.

graph_not_found.cause: The Teams app is not installed for the recipient, so Microsoft Graph cannot target them (404).
graph_not_found.remedy: Install or org-allow the Alga PSA app for that user.

graph_throttled.remedy: Transient; Alga PSA retries with backoff. Investigate only if it persists.

graph_server_error.cause: Microsoft Graph returned a server error (5xx).
graph_server_error.remedy: Transient Graph outage; Alga PSA retries. Wait and check Microsoft service health if it persists.

transient.cause: A temporary failure (network or timeout) interrupted delivery.
transient.remedy: Retried automatically; no action needed unless failures persist.

unknown.cause: The failure did not map to a known cause.
unknown.remedy: Check the server logs for the delivery error detail and re-run diagnostics.

workflow.title: CSV Workflow
workflow.trackingDescription: The CSV export includes tracking category columns that link each Xero invoice back to its Alga source. When you import tax from Xero, these tracking categories are used to automatically match invoices - no manual reconciliation needed.
